label: frontier • define a saved view, run it, deliver the result as an artifact
query: In your agent database: create a table metrics with columns day (TEXT) and value (INTEGER); insert exactly these rows: mon 3, tue 5, wed 7. Then define a saved view named weekly_total that selects SUM(value) AS total FROM metrics, run that view, and share a short markdown artifact named metrics.md summarizing the weekly total.
notes: Saved-view lifecycle (db_define_view → db_run_view) chained into artifact delivery, with ordering asserted. dbState pins the persisted rows (SUM 15) independent of the prose.
